'''ngachaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enal|enal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enal|enal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngachaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæchæhæth|ngæchæhæth]] || [[word:ngæchæhæj|ngæchæhæj]] || [[word:ngæchæhæsh|ngæchæhæsh]] || [[word:ngæchæhæ|ngæchæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngachachahath|ngachachahath]] || [[word:ngachachahaj|ngachachahaj]] || [[word:ngachachahash|ngachachahash]] || [[word:ngachachaha|ngachachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngachahath|ngachahath]] || [[word:ngachahaj|ngachahaj]] || [[word:ngachahash|ngachahash]] || [[word:ngachaha|ngachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngachafhath|ngachafhath]] || [[word:ngachafhaj|ngachafhaj]] || [[word:ngachafhash|ngachafhash]] || [[word:ngachafhaf|ngachafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngachahatha|ngachahatha]] || [[word:ngachahaja|ngachahaja]] || [[word:ngachahasha|ngachahasha]] || [[word:ngachahaka|ngachahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngachahath|ngachahath]] || [[word:ngachahaj|ngachahaj]] || [[word:ngachahash|ngachahash]] || [[word:ngachaha|ngachaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngachahathal|ngachahathal]] || [[word:ngachahajal|ngachahajal]] || [[word:ngachahashal|ngachahashal]] || [[word:ngachahakal|ngachahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngachahathatha|ngachahathatha]] || [[word:ngachahajaja|ngachahajaja]] || [[word:ngachahashasha|ngachahashasha]] || [[word:ngachahaka|ngachahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngachahathan|ngachahathan]] || [[word:ngachahajan|ngachahajan]] || [[word:ngachahashan|ngachahashan]] || [[word:ngachahakan|ngachahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngachahathaoro|ngachahathaoro]] || [[word:ngachahajaoro|ngachahajaoro]] || [[word:ngachahashaoro|ngachahashaoro]] || [[word:ngachahakaoro|ngachahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
